emails.subject: RE: Wolf -Reply -Reply -Reply
emails.body: Wrong Bill Grace/ I'll forward. To: Fitzpatrick, Amy; Williams, Bill

emails.subject: FW: Wolf -Reply -Reply -Reply
emails.body: Bill, Any suggestions as to who should interview Darrin Presto? Let me know and I'll set it up! Thanks, Grace To: Fitzpatrick, Amy; Williams, Bill

emails.subject: RE: Wolf -Reply -Reply -Reply
emails.body: Any particular day that works best for you? Let me know. I will contact Darrin this afternoon to find out his availability. Thanks, G To: Rodriguez, Grace
